name: Bug report

assignees: ""
---

## Description

Describe the issue clearly.

What part of the framework is affected?

- documentation
- ontology
- schema
- example
- prompt
- specification

---

## Expected Behavior

Explain what you expected to happen.

---

## Actual Behavior

Explain what actually happened.

---

## Location

File or section where the issue occurs.

Example:

schema/reality-event.schema.json

docs/validation.md

---

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the issue here.
